channel.title: Metals Industry News Feed
channel.description: Automated news feed for aluminum, steel, copper, and nickel industries

item.title: Chile's copper output declines year over year
item.description: Mining.com reports that Chile's copper output fell to 399.954 metric tons from 464.056 metric tons in the same month a year earlier. The piece highlights a significant production drop in the world's largest copper-producing country.

item.title: Copper jumps to a two-week high after truce-related market optimism
item.description: NewsNow aggregates a report that copper rose to a two-week high after news of a U.S.-Iran truce deal. While mainly a price update, it reflects broader market conditions that can influence producer incentives and capacity utilization.

item.title: Clean energy's nickel rush is heading straight for some of Earth's richest ecosystems
item.description: This article highlights the environmental tradeoffs of meeting growing nickel demand for stainless steel and clean energy technologies. It cites new research warning that expanding nickel supply in tropical regions could threaten priority conservation areas.

item.title: Industry Data
item.description: AISI reports that domestic raw steel production in the week ending May 30, 2026 was 1,872,000 net tons. The capability utilization rate was 81.1%, making this the most directly relevant recent capacity and production update in the search results.

item.title: Domestic raw steel production reached 1.872 million net tons in the week ending May 30, 2026
item.description: AISI reported that U.S. domestic raw steel production for the week ending May 30, 2026 was 1,872,000 net tons, with capability utilization at 81.1 percent. This is a direct capacity and production update relevant to the steel market, though the page is a data release rather than a narrative news article.

item.title: Copper futures price today: current price at 6.4195
item.description: Investing.com lists the current copper futures price at 6.4195, with a previous close of 6.4260. The page provides live pricing and trading-range context for monitoring short-term market movement.

item.title: Latest Copper News
item.description: NewsNow aggregates recent copper market headlines, including commentary that copper prices may need to rise as a supply crunch looms and that the market may move toward tighter balance and higher prices. The feed indicates active coverage of supply, earnings, and price outlook themes.

item.title: Price of Nickel per Pound
item.description: Kitco provides live nickel charts and spot price data from major international markets. It is useful for tracking nickel market trends across regions, though the snippet does not include a specific news update.

item.title: Nickel Prices and Nickel Futures Prices
item.description: Barchart presents current nickel prices, futures quotes, charts, and related news. The page is designed for real-time market tracking and indicates it reflects the latest session available.

item.title: Nornickel says nickel output flat year-on-year in first quarter
item.description: Nornickel reported first-quarter nickel output of 42,000 metric tons, unchanged from a year earlier. The company also kept its full-year production forecast for nickel and other metals unchanged, indicating stable capacity guidance despite current output being flat.

item.title: Tenaris to acquire Romanian pipe maker Artrom for €86 million
item.description: Tenaris said it entered into a definitive agreement to buy Artrom Steel Tubes S.A. for €86 million. The piece reports the transaction as a company news item centered on Tenaris's expansion in steel pipe manufacturing.

item.title: Aluminum Price (Monthly) - Historical Data & Trends
item.description: YCharts shows aluminum at 3,666.10, up from 3,599.85 the prior month and 2,448.79 one year earlier. The data suggests a sustained upward price trend over both the short and long term.

item.title: Steel price edges higher to 3,185 CNY/T
item.description: Steel prices rose to 3,185 CNY/T, up 0.38% from the previous day. Over the past month, prices declined 1.67%, but they remain 8.67% higher over the longer term.

item.title: Copper futures climb above $6.4/lb as supplies tighten and demand stays strong
item.description: Copper futures rose above $6.4 per pound, reaching their highest level in more than two weeks. The move was attributed to tightening global supplies and robust demand, indicating a firmer near-term market tone.

item.title: Copper prices near live market highs amid industrial metals strength
item.description: The page reports the current copper futures price at 6.4650 versus a previous close of 6.4195. It provides live pricing and trading-range context, which suggests copper remains elevated in recent trading.

item.title: Copper price trends reflect a tighter supply outlook
item.description: Aggregated headlines highlight expectations that copper prices must rise as a supply crunch looms. The feed also points to commentary describing the market as oversupplied now but potentially tighter and higher later.

item.title: Tenaris press releases
item.description: This is Tenaris’s press release listing page, which includes company announcements such as shareholder meeting results and other corporate news. The search result does not provide a specific article title from the past 24 hours, but it may contain the latest official updates.

item.title: Newsroom | Tenaris
item.description: This is Tenaris’s newsroom page for company news, projects, events, and products. The result does not identify a specific article, but it is a likely source for recent Tenaris-related updates.

item.title: News listing | Tenaris
item.description: This Tenaris news listing includes company announcements and other items, including an acquisition-related update. The search result excerpt indicates a recent announcement, but it does not provide enough detail to confirm publication timing within the last 24 hours.

item.title: Alupro unveils sustainable aluminium manifesto
item.description: Alupro has released a new manifesto focused on making aluminium packaging more sustainable in the UK. The article highlights recycling and industry-policy themes tied to lowering the environmental impact of aluminium packaging.

item.title: Steel price data shows a slight pullback after recent gains
item.description: Trading Economics shows steel prices fell to 1,189.10 USD/T on June 1, 2026, down 0.08% from the previous day. This indicates short-term volatility even as the broader trend remains elevated relative to prior months.

item.title: HRC Steel rises to 1191.01 USD/T as prices strengthen in early June
item.description: Trading Economics reports that hot-rolled coil steel rose to 1191.01 USD/T on June 2, 2026, up 0.25% from the previous day. The item also notes a 4.57% gain over the past month, suggesting continued upward momentum in steel prices.

item.title: Asian Steel Spreads Near 15-Year Low
item.description: The video discusses near-term pressure on steel prices and margins, with commentary that prices have weakened recently. It also highlights weak Chinese demand as a factor keeping spreads elevated and suggests the setup could gradually improve if policy support and demand growth strengthen.

item.title: Steel Price News: Are Prices About to Drop? Latest Hot Rolled Coil...
item.description: Ryerson says the latest steel price news shows prices continuing to move higher across flat, plate, and long products. The report attributes this to constrained supply and improving demand reinforcing current market strength.

item.title: Copper Market News & Forecasts
item.description: Fastmarkets reports that copper producers, including Atlas Mining, posted higher first-quarter 2026 earnings because of elevated copper prices. The article also points to tight concentrate output as part of the current market backdrop.

item.title: Copper up 9% since Iran war, near January peak
item.description: This market update says copper has risen 9% since the Iran war and is trading near its January peak. It frames the move in the context of broader commodity strength and possible demand drivers such as the AI boom and supply shortages.

item.title: Copper prices hit a new record high, but is the metals trade 'stretched'?
item.description: This video discusses copper hitting a fresh record high and questions whether the broader metals rally has become overextended. It highlights market debate about sustainability after the strong price run.

item.title: Copper Market News & Forecasts
item.description: Fastmarkets reports that copper producers, including Atlas Mining, posted higher first-quarter 2026 earnings on the back of elevated copper prices, while concentrate output is also discussed. The search result points to current market coverage, but no individual article date is shown.

item.title: Copper rebounds from 6-week lows after outages at major mines
item.description: This video discusses copper rebounding after outages at major mines and notes that limited new project development is constraining supply. It also mentions weak Chinese demand and bank forecasts for future copper prices.

item.title: Copper hits record high amid global shortage
item.description: This video discusses copper reaching record highs amid a global shortage and includes commentary on market conditions. It is relevant to production and capacity constraints, but the search result does not provide a publication date.

item.title: Nickel rises as Indonesia signals tighter supply management
item.description: Trading Economics reports that nickel prices moved higher as Indonesia continued to signal tighter supply management. The market is reacting to expectations that production and capacity constraints could support prices.

item.title: Aluminium Price Today
item.description: Investing.com lists current aluminum futures at 3,762.00, matching the latest market level shown in the search results. The page is oriented toward live pricing, charts, and market movement tracking rather than a narrative news report.

item.title: US steel demand 'nowhere near' prior expectations
item.description: MEPS International says U.S. steel demand has fallen well short of earlier expectations, while supply remains plentiful. The report also notes that flat steel prices were down and that tariffs and uncertainty are continuing to weigh on demand and pricing.

item.title: Steel Price News: Are Prices About to Drop? Latest Hot Rolled Coil ...
item.description: Ryerson’s market update says steel prices are continuing to move higher across flat, plate, and long products, supported by constrained supply and improving demand. The article is focused on whether recent price strength may reverse, making it relevant to near-term market trend tracking.

item.title: Steel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
item.description: Trading Economics reports that steel prices fell to 3,183 CNY/T on June 3, 2026, down 0.22% from the previous day. The page also shows that prices are down over the past month but remain higher year over year, indicating mixed short-term and medium-term momentum.

item.title: Copper Futures Price Today
item.description: Investing.com shows copper futures at 6.5933, below the previous close of 6.6765. This reflects a pullback in the metal’s price, consistent with a volatile short-term trading environment.

item.title: Record copper price signals accelerating race for supplies
item.description: Reuters reports copper prices surging to records above $13,000 a metric ton amid fears of shortages and expectations of tighter supply. The article is not from the last 24 hours, but it is directly relevant to production constraints and capacity concerns in copper markets.

item.title: Nickel Industry News, Views and Commentary - Chronickels
item.description: This Nickel Institute blog page introduces commentary and articles focused on sustainability, treatment processes, and innovations in nickel production. It appears to be a broader topical hub rather than a single news article.

item.title: Innovations in Sustainable Nickel Production: The Path to Low-Cost Solutions
item.description: This article looks at innovations in mining and refining that aim to reduce costs while improving the environmental performance of nickel production. It frames sustainable nickel production as both an industrial and economic opportunity.

item.title: Citing Benefits of 232 Tariffs, Century Aluminum Announces Restart to Bring Mt. Holly, SC Plant to Full Production
item.description: Century Aluminum said it will restart operations to bring its Mt. Holly, South Carolina plant to full production by June 30, 2026. The company said the plant is currently running at 75% capacity and that the move will increase U.S. aluminum production by 10%.

item.title: HRC Steel fell to 1,183.11 USD/T on June 4, 2026
item.description: Hot rolled coil steel prices moved lower, down 0.66% from the previous day. Trading Economics also reports that prices were still up 3.87% over the past month and 35.68% higher over a longer comparison period, indicating a mixed short-term trend.

item.title: Steel fell to 3,170 CNY/T on June 4, 2026
item.description: Chinese steel prices edged down 0.28% from the previous day. Despite the daily decline, Trading Economics says steel remained 7.82% higher than a longer reference period, suggesting underlying price support even as momentum softened.

item.title: Steel prices, news & market analysis
item.description: Argus reports on a major EU steel import measure that would introduce tariff-rate quotas of 18.3 million tonnes per year and a 50% out-of-quota duty for many steel products. This policy development is relevant to market trends because it could affect import flows and regional pricing.

item.title: Nickel futures pull back from three-week high as investors take profits
item.description: Nickel futures were trading around $18,590 per tonne after retreating from a three-week high near $19,220. The move was attributed to profit-taking following recent gains, suggesting a still-volatile but elevated market.

item.title: Nickel Futures Price Today
item.description: Investing.com shows nickel futures at 18,776.50, with a previous close of 18,812.88. The page provides live pricing, daily trading range information, and market context for near-term nickel moves.

item.title: World's Biggest Nickel Mine in Indonesia Told to Slash Output
item.description: The world's biggest nickel mine in Indonesia has been told to drastically cut output as the country seeks to support global prices for nickel, one of its key export commodities. Bloomberg reports that PT Weda Bay Nickel may receive a much smaller ore production quota this year than in 2025, and the company says it will seek a revision.

item.title: Cogne Acciai Speciali acquires a controlling stake in a scrap supplier
item.description: This report says Cogne Acciai Speciali agreed to acquire 65% of Com.Steel Inox, one of its main scrap suppliers. The transaction was said to be subject to regulatory approvals and expected to complete in the coming months.

item.title: Cogne initiates another three-month temporary layoffs round
item.description: Cogne Acciai Speciali reportedly notified trade unions that it would implement a second temporary layoff scheme this year. The article frames the move as another three-month round of cassa integrazione affecting the Italian stainless steel producer.

item.title: US could impose 37.5% tariffs on Brazilian basic pig iron by mid-July
item.description: Argus reports that the US may apply combined tariffs of up to 37.5% on Brazilian basic pig iron if current Section 301 actions proceed. The article highlights trade-policy pressure that could affect raw-material costs and downstream steel market pricing.

item.title: South Australia backs Whyalla steelworks with additional funding
item.description: Argus says the South Australian government will provide A$319 million in extra funding over two years to support the Whyalla steelworks. The move is significant for regional steel supply and market stability in Australia.

item.title: Steel price rebounds to 3159 CNY/T as market remains volatile
item.description: Trading Economics says steel rose to 3159 CNY/T on June 5, 2026, up 0.25% from the previous day. Despite the daily increase, the price is still down 2.47% over the past month, showing a mixed short-term trend.

item.title: Steel prices weakened recently as Asian spreads approach a 15-year low
item.description: This segment says steel prices have weakened recently, weighing on margins for steel companies in the near term. It also highlights that Asian steel spreads are near a 15-year low, with weak Chinese demand cited as a key factor.

item.title: Steel Price News: Are Prices About to Drop? Latest Hot Rolled Coil analysis
item.description: Ryerson’s market update says increased demand and constrained supply have pushed steel pricing higher. It also notes that lead times for many steel products have extended into June, suggesting tight market conditions.

item.title: Copper Rebounds From 6-Week Lows After Outages At Major Mines, Limited New Project Development
item.description: This report says copper prices rebounded after outages at major mines and limited new project development tightened supply. It also notes that slow Chinese demand has helped keep prices from rising even faster.

item.title: Copper Prices Are at a Record High on Supply Stress
item.description: This video discusses copper reaching record highs after a major industry conference in Shanghai highlighted signs of supply stress. It points to concerns that there is not enough supply to meet demand from new smelters worldwide.

item.title: Copper Hits Record High Amid Global Shortage
item.description: This segment covers copper prices surging to record levels amid a global shortage. It features commentary on the recent price spike and the market’s supply constraints.

item.title: Copper Archives
item.description: MINING.COM’s copper archive includes recent coverage on copper concentrate waivers and Mopani Copper Mines. The page is a news hub that may contain current articles related to production and capacity developments.

item.title: 3 Questions: Can we secure a sustainable supply of nickel?
item.description: The article discusses whether nickel, a critical material for clean energy technologies, can be supplied sustainably. It highlights the need for stronger environmental and community protections, harmonized sustainability standards, technology transfer, and responsible investment to stabilize the nickel supply chain.

item.title: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
item.description: Trading Economics reports that aluminum fell to 3,598.50 USD/T on June 5, 2026, down 1.88% from the previous day. The page also shows that prices remained higher over the past month and year despite the daily decline.

item.title: Copper - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
item.description: Copper fell to 6.25 USD/lb on June 5, 2026, down 3.97% from the previous day. The market page also notes that copper is still up 1.89% over the past month and nearly 30% over the past year, indicating continued volatility alongside a strong longer-term trend.

item.title: Nickel futures edge down to 18,575 USD/T as monthly decline continues
item.description: Trading Economics reports that nickel fell to 18,575 USD/T on June 5, 2026, down 0.32% from the previous day. The update also says nickel was down 3.26% over the past month, although it remained nearly 20% above a longer comparison period.

item.title: Indonesian smelters cut production on lower nickel ore quota
item.description: Indonesia’s energy ministry has reduced the 2026 nickel ore production quota to 260 million to 270 million metric tons, below the previous 320 million-ton level. The article says smelters are already cutting production in response to the tighter ore supply.

item.title: Steel and Stainless Are Moving Differently—And It Matters
item.description: This video discusses how steel and stainless markets are diverging and why that matters for buyers and sellers. It notes that base price increases have not been reported recently, while a hot band pricing increase in Indonesia was mentioned as a notable development.

item.title: Steel Market Prices, Data, and Analysis
item.description: This page offers timely steel market pricing, analysis, and real-time data for market participants. It is a general market intelligence resource rather than a single news article.

item.title: The Latest Global Steel Prices, Indices & Forecasts
item.description: MEPS provides benchmark steel prices, forecasts, and analysis for global markets. The page is a market data and forecasting hub rather than a specific news story from the past 24 hours.

item.title: Steel and steel raw materials
item.description: Fastmarkets covers US and global steel price developments, forecasts, and market analysis. The search result identifies the section as a general source for steel market news rather than a recent standalone article.

item.title: Copper facts
item.description: This page states that global refined copper production increased by 3.8% in 2024 to 27.5 million tonnes, up from 26.5 million tonnes in 2023. It provides background on copper production levels and broader supply statistics, though it is not a breaking-news article.

item.title: Why the US Is Pushing to Rebuild Its Copper Supply
item.description: This video discusses U.S. efforts to rebuild copper supply and notes that a facility is planning phase-two expansion to reach higher output capacity. It appears focused on strategic copper production and capacity expansion in the United States.

item.title: Aluminum Prices and Aluminum Futures Prices
item.description: Barchart provides the latest aluminum futures prices, charts, and market news from the latest trading session. It is useful for tracking near-real-time price movement and market sentiment.

item.title: Nickel spot price holds near 18,545 as market remains active
item.description: Business Insider Markets shows nickel at 18,545.00 with a gain of 170.00, or 0.93%. The page presents a live spot price chart and indicates continued movement in nickel markets.

item.title: Nickel futures price today at 18,505.88 amid market concerns
item.description: Investing.com lists nickel futures at 18,505.88 and says prices rose on Tuesday amid market concerns. The page provides a live futures snapshot and short-term market commentary.

item.title: LME Nickel market page tracks current and historical prices
item.description: The London Metal Exchange page provides current and historical nickel prices, stocks, and monthly averages. It is a primary market reference for nickel pricing and inventory trends.

item.title: Tenaris Net Profit Falls on Americas Slowdown, Launches New Buyback Plan
item.description: Tenaris reported a 10% decline in third-quarter net profit, citing weaker demand in North and South America and lower shipments to offshore projects and Argentina. The company also announced a new share buyback plan.

item.title: Aluminum Drops as Trump Moves to Narrow Levies on Metal Products
item.description: Aluminum prices fell after reports that President Donald Trump may narrow the scope of U.S. import tariffs on some aluminum and steel products. The report says LME aluminum dropped as traders reacted to the possible policy change, with broader weakness across metals and risk assets.

item.title: U.S. Steel Manufacturers Plan Near-Term Capacity Additions
item.description: Steel manufacturers across the U.S. are planning more than $6 billion in capital-spending projects set to begin in the second quarter of 2026. The article says many of the projects are tied to specific customers and that electric arc furnace technology is increasingly replacing traditional blast-furnace technology.

item.title: Copper Prices Crash $0.20! Trade Shock Sends Scrappers ...
item.description: This video says copper prices dropped by $0.20 during a volatile week, which it describes as a shock to the scrap market. It focuses on immediate pricing pressure and the impact on scrap buyers and sellers.

item.title: Prysmian shares rise as Italian cable maker seen as winner amid US copper tariffs
item.description: Prysmian shares rose after investors viewed the Italian cable maker as a likely beneficiary of US copper tariffs. The report says the company was among the best performers on Italy’s blue-chip market as analysts pointed to potential competitive advantages.

item.title: Nickel traded around $18,300 per tonne after a sharp fall
item.description: Nickel prices were trading around $18,300 per tonne after falling sharply from above $19,220, reaching their lowest level in over a month. The move was attributed to investors locking in profits, with the market also showing a daily decline to about $18,400 per tonne.

item.title: New Report: U.S. Primary Aluminum Demand Projected to Surge by up to 40% by 2035 Amid Trade and Supply Chain Uncertainty
item.description: Industrious Labs says a new report projects U.S. primary aluminum demand could rise by as much as 40% by 2035. The report says that would require about 6.4 million metric tons annually, increasing pressure on domestic supply and capacity.

item.title: 3 innovations in green steel
item.description: This article highlights recent developments in low-carbon steelmaking, including hydrogen-based steel plants, molten oxide electrolysis, and other process innovations. It also notes funding and investment activity around companies and projects working to reduce steel-sector emissions.

item.title: Copper rose to 6.31 USD/Lbs on June 9, 2026
item.description: Trading Economics reports that copper is up 0.11% from the previous day and trading at 6.31 USD/Lbs. The update also notes that copper has fallen over the past month but remains significantly higher on a longer horizon.

item.title: Copper PRICE Today | Live Price of Copper per Ounce
item.description: This live quote page provides current copper pricing, charts, and related market information. It is useful for tracking short-term price moves, though it does not provide a dated news article in the search result snippet.

item.title: Tenaris delivers record-setting Blue Coil string
item.description: Tenaris says it delivered a record-setting Blue Coil string, highlighting a recent products and services update on its official news page. The result suggests ongoing industrial activity and product development, but the provided snippet does not include Italy-specific details.

item.title: Major U.S. aluminum producer boosts production to full capacity
item.description: Fox News reports that Century Aluminum is boosting production to full capacity amid President Donald Trump's tariffs. The item focuses on the company's response to trade policy changes and the implications for U.S. aluminum output.

item.title: Steel fell to 3,132 CNY/T on June 10, 2026, down 0.25% from the previous day
item.description: Trading Economics reports that steel prices declined slightly on June 10, with the benchmark price falling 0.25% from the previous day. The page also notes that steel remains above its level from one month ago, indicating mixed short-term momentum.

item.title: MCX Aluminium - Aluminium Rate in India Today Live on Economic Times
item.description: This market page tracks live MCX aluminium pricing in India and shows the current rate at 383.50 per kg. It is a commodity market snapshot rather than a news article, but it can help identify near-term pricing and trading trends.

item.title: Aluminum Prices Chart, Price of Aluminum Per Pound Today, LME Aluminum Price
item.description: This page provides an aluminum price chart and current market reference data for aluminum pricing. The result is a market-tracking resource rather than a dated news story, so it may be useful for recent price movement analysis but does not provide a specific article timestamp.

item.title: Major US aluminum producer boosts production to full capacity
item.description: Fox News reports that Century Aluminum is boosting production to full capacity, with the move tied to recent U.S. tariff policy. The segment highlights the company's operational expansion and its relevance to domestic aluminum supply.

item.title: America's big new aluminum smelter is still waiting on a power deal
item.description: This article says a planned U.S. aluminum smelter is still awaiting a finalized power agreement before construction can move forward. The companies involved expect construction to begin in late 2026 and production to start by the end of the decade.

item.title: Commodity Corner | Aluminium prices are on the rise as US premium hits record high
item.description: This report says aluminum prices are rising, with LME prices near three-year highs and up 13% in 2025. It also says the U.S. consumer premium has reached record levels, driven by tight inventories, production concerns, and strong demand from construction, auto, packaging, and green energy.

item.title: US aluminum, steel prices jump on Trump's new tariffs
item.description: US steel and aluminum prices rose sharply after President Donald Trump announced he would double tariffs on the metals to 50%. The report says traders reacted by pushing aluminum prices up 54% and US hot-rolled coil steel up about 7.5%, while foreign steelmakers' shares fell.

item.title: The Future of Steel Manufacturing: Key Trends & Innovations
item.description: The article discusses sustainability, digitalization, additive manufacturing, nanotechnology, and smart steel as key trends shaping the future of steel manufacturing. It also emphasizes recycling and sustainable sourcing as important directions for reducing the industry's environmental impact.

item.title: Smelting Barriers: The Innovators Forging a New Future for Iron and Steel
item.description: This piece profiles emerging technologies and startups working to reduce emissions in iron and steel manufacturing. It emphasizes the importance of innovation across existing assets, demand reduction, and novel production methods for a more resilient industry.

item.title: Iron and Steel Technology Roadmap
item.description: The roadmap outlines technology options for deep emissions reductions in steelmaking, including hydrogen, carbon capture, bioenergy, and direct electrification. It frames these pathways as part of a broader strategy for aligning the sector with climate goals.

item.title: Copper prices pull back after strong rally
item.description: This market note says copper prices have corrected after reaching multi-year highs, indicating a pullback in the non-ferrous metals market. It frames the move as part of a broader scrap-metal pricing update rather than a standalone macroeconomic report.

item.title: Copper prices crash $0.20! Trade shock sends scrappers ...
item.description: This video reports a sharp drop in copper prices of about $0.20, describing the move as a shock for scrap sellers and market participants. The title suggests immediate market volatility, but the search snippet does not provide full article-style details.

item.title: Copper price hits highest in over a year on Grasberg disruption, Fed outlook
item.description: Copper prices rose to their highest level in more than a year, driven by mounting global supply disruptions and expectations that US rate cuts could support industrial demand. The article says the rally was strengthened by Freeport-McMoRan declaring force majeure at its Grasberg mine in Indonesia, a major copper-producing asset.

item.title: Copper & nickel see record high this week
item.description: A commodity strategist discusses nickel and copper hitting record highs this week before dipping later in the session. The discussion attributes the rally to strong demand and elevated volatility in 2026.

item.title: Nickel Prices Off The Bottom
item.description: S&P Global reports that nickel prices have moved above US$10,000 per tonne and describes the outlook as positive. The piece indicates a recovery phase in nickel prices after earlier weakness.

item.title: Nickel prices, news and market analysis
item.description: Fastmarkets provides ongoing coverage of nickel prices, market trends, and volatility in the nickel market. The page is positioned as a hub for current pricing and market analysis rather than a single news report.
